context: Tests whether the agent knows the correct deployment commands, event inspection commands, and process for executing validation tests.

checklist.name: Initial deployment command
checklist.description: execute-validation.sh includes 'cdk deploy' for initial state

checklist.name: No approval flag
checklist.description: execute-validation.sh uses '--require-approval never' flag on cdk deploy commands

checklist.name: Resource ARN recording
checklist.description: execute-validation.sh includes step to record or note the table ARN/name after initial deployment

checklist.name: Redeploy after change
checklist.description: execute-validation.sh shows making the property change and redeploying

checklist.name: describe-stack-events command
checklist.description: execute-validation.sh or event-analysis.md includes 'aws cloudformation describe-stack-events' command

checklist.name: Resource type filter
checklist.description: The describe-stack-events command uses --query with ResourceType filter (e.g., ResourceType==`AWS::DynamoDB::Table`)

checklist.name: Event field extraction
checklist.description: The --query extracts at least 2 of: Timestamp, ResourceStatus, ResourceStatusReason

checklist.name: Replacement indicators
checklist.description: event-analysis.md explains that DELETE + CREATE events indicate replacement

checklist.name: Update indicators
checklist.description: event-analysis.md explains that UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS/UPDATE_COMPLETE indicate in-place update

checklist.name: Failure handling
checklist.description: event-analysis.md or execute-validation.sh mentions stopping/debugging if deployment fails
